title: predict-queue-wait output data
description: Shape of the `data` field on a successful `predict-queue-wait` envelope. Mirrors `PredictionResult.to_dict()` from hpc_mapreduce.job.queue_wait_baseline.

predicted_wait_sec.description: Median (p50) predicted wait in seconds. null when the prediction is cold.

method.description: Which backend produced the prediction. 'des*' tags indicate the DES backend ran or attempted to run; 'diurnal_ma'/'blended_ma'/'global_ma' tag the v1 baseline tiers; 'no_data' is cold start.

features_adjustment_factor.description: Order-book adjustment factor (Phase 1c). 1.0 when no current_features were supplied or on the DES path.

p10_wait_sec.description: DES p10 quantile in seconds. null on the diurnal_ma path.

p90_wait_sec.description: DES p90 quantile in seconds. null on the diurnal_ma path.

n_replications.description: Number of DES passes executed. null on the diurnal_ma path.
